metric_caveats: Comparison group gan_s0_multistage_gepa_gpt_validation_v1; arm G2 optimizer_strategy over a multi-stage verify-repair path.
The GEPA feedback metric gan_s0_stage_attributed_frequency_feedback is optimizer-facing only and does not replace gan_frequency_deterministic_v1 scoring.
Monthly-frequency, Purist category, and Pragmatic category metrics are benchmark-facing.
Evidence quote support, schema validity, optimizer stats, selected instruction length, and verifier over-repair rate are diagnostic gates.
Uses Gan gold seizure_frequency_number[0]; reference is diagnostic only.
This capped validation config is not published Gan benchmark reproduction.
